title: lophopyrum turcicum
intro: Lophopyrum turcicum, also known as foxtail millet, is a type of annual grass that belongs to the family Poaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Lophopyrum turcicum include reducing stress, improving digestion, and boosting the immune system. Herbal preparations of Lophopyrum turcicum include tea, infusion, and decoction, which can be used to support overall health and well-being.
